Tip of the day
Hunting activities that require inputs give twice the rolls of their main loot table!

A shiny steel sword that's sharp enough to cut bread.

The Steel sword item is a crafted item.

Requirements

This item has no requirements to use it.

This item has no attributes.

Uses

Job Boards

Steel sword can be requested from the following job:

Job Board Name Location Quantity Item Type Rewards
Azurazera job board Azurazera 4 +2  Jarvonia Faction Reputation
Azurazera job board Azurazera 2 +2  Jarvonia Faction Reputation
1x   Chest of Jarvonia

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Smith a steel sword

You make a steel sword from a steel bar.

Make a steel sword from a steel bar.

Used 		Recipe
